3D Game Designer

Who I Am

ABOUT
ME

I'm a 3D Game Designer based in Lahore, Pakistan — currently building worlds at Goldfinch. My work lives at the intersection of art and interaction: sculpting environments, crafting assets, and designing the systems that make players feel truly present in a game.

I specialize in real-time 3D workflows — from low-poly modeling and PBR texturing in Blender and Substance Painter to full environment assembly and optimization in Unity. Every polygon is intentional, every material tells a story.

Whether it's an open-world crime city or a physics sandbox, I focus on the details that make a game world feel alive — lighting, scale, material fidelity, and the invisible craft that players feel but never see.

Work History

EXPERIENCE

3D Artist
Goldfinch · Lahore, Pakistan

What I've Built

PROJECTS

01
Unity · Mobile · 3D
Crime & Gangster Simulator

Open-world 3D crime simulation game — I designed the city environment, vehicle assets, and NPC layouts. Features RCC vehicles, minimap system and AdMob monetization.

02
Unity · Survival
Big Foot

Survival adventure game set in a dense forest environment. Responsible for terrain, foliage, and creature 3D assets, alongside stealth mechanics and AI behavior systems.

03
Unity · Simulation
Bum Simulator

Open-world survival simulation with NPC interaction, upgrades, and resource systems.

04
Unity · Stealth
Barry's Prison Escape

Stealth escape game with a fully modeled prison interior — cells, corridors, guard rooms. Designed guard AI patrol routes, interactive puzzle props and environment lighting.

Unity · Simulation
Card Shop Simulator

Shop management system with inventory, pricing and customer AI.
